theme: Follow-up email after meeting a client

vocab.example: Let me recap what we agreed on in the meeting.
vocab.example_vi: Để tôi tóm tắt lại những gì chúng ta đã thống nhất trong cuộc họp.

vocab.example: I've attached the proposal document to this email.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi đã đính kèm bản đề xuất vào email này.

vocab.example: Please take a look at the proposal I sent yesterday.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng xem qua bản đề xuất tôi gửi hôm qua.

vocab.example: Here are the next steps we discussed today.
vocab.example_vi: Đây là các bước tiếp theo chúng ta đã bàn hôm nay.

vocab.example: I'll touch base with you again next week.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi sẽ liên hệ lại với bạn vào tuần tới.

vocab.example: Please respond to my email by Friday.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng phản hồi email của tôi trước thứ Sáu.

vocab.example: Could you clarify one point from our last call?
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có thể làm rõ giúp tôi một điểm trong cuộc gọi trước không?

vocab.example: Can we confirm the delivery timeline this week?
vocab.example_vi: Chúng ta có thể xác nhận mốc thời gian giao hàng trong tuần này không?

listening.title: Following up after a client meeting

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: Hi Ms. Lan, thanks again for meeting with us yesterday.

lines.speaker: Lan (client)
lines.text: Of course, Nam. It was a great meeting.

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: I want to recap what we discussed in our meeting.

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: I've attached the proposal to the email I just sent.

lines.speaker: Lan (client)
lines.text: Great, I'll review the proposal this afternoon.

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: The email also includes the next steps we agreed on.

lines.speaker: Lan (client)
lines.text: Can you clarify one detail about the delivery timeline?

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: Of course, let me clarify that part right now.

lines.speaker: Lan (client)
lines.text: Thanks, that helps. Please respond if anything changes.

lines.speaker: Nam (sales rep)
lines.text: I will. I'll touch base with you again next week.

questions.q: What did Nam send along with the email?
What does Lan ask Nam to clarify?
When will Nam touch base with Lan again?

shadowing: Let me recap what we discussed in yesterday's meeting together.
I've attached the full proposal to the email I sent.
Here are the next steps that we both agreed on.
I'll touch base with you again sometime early next week.
Please respond by the end of this week if possible.
